summary: Archive game playback from the Games page
description:
GIVEN a user who is entitled for Archive game playback is logged in

AND the user is on the Games page

AND an Archive game is present on the Games page

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects an Archive game from the Games page

AND selects a team feed for playback
steps.result:
THEN the Games page is dismissed

AND the video player displays full screen

AND playback starts successfully
